body: The nightly batch job now receives 504 errors after five minutes
We are checking gateway latency and will update before the SLA window
Gateway shard east shows queue saturation during batch sync
Users are redirected back to the sign in page after SSO
Please send the new IdP metadata fingerprint from your admin console
Metadata cache may not have refreshed for the tenant
The renewal invoice appears to charge ten duplicate seats
We are reviewing the renewal ledger and will confirm refund eligibility
Finance can provide the original purchase order if needed
Updated contacts no longer appear in our CRM integration
We are checking sync logs for contact update events
Sync worker skipped records with blank external IDs
Large exports stop near 80 percent and never finish
We are testing the export with the same filters in a safe tenant copy
Export worker memory pressure appears after six million rows
New admins cannot complete MFA enrollment after promotion
We refreshed the admin policy and asked the user to retry enrollment
Ticket moved to resolved after successful enrollment
Our clients get 429 responses below the agreed quota
We found burst tokens resetting slowly and applied a quota refresh
The API client has run without 429 responses for two hours
Can the canceled pilot invoice be refunded
The refund policy allows pilot refunds before production activation
Ticket closed after refund guidance was accepted
The billing owner cannot access invoices after a permission update
We are validating the billing owner role and portal permissions
Role propagation failed after the permission migration
How long do archived export files remain available
Archived export files remain available according to the retention policy
Ticket closed after policy answer was accepted
Salesforce sync stopped without warning after the token expired
We are restoring the token and checking why the expiry alert did not fire
Token expiry alert job skipped tenants with legacy OAuth apps
Webhook callbacks are delayed by about thirty minutes
We identified a notification queue delay and are draining the backlog
Notification worker pool was scaled to clear delayed callbacks
SCIM groups sync but roles do not update
We found the group mapping rule and asked for a test user confirmation
The test user received the expected role after the mapping change
Finance cannot see whether the credit memo was approved
We checked the billing ledger and the credit memo is approved
Ticket resolved with credit memo reference sent to customer
API latency in LATAM is above our normal baseline
We are comparing regional latency before and after the deploy
Regional cache warmup was disabled for LATAM workers
Our sandbox OAuth callback URL is rejected during authorization
The sandbox app used the production callback allowlist
Ticket closed after callback configuration was corrected
Custom fields are missing from the scheduled export
We added the custom field schema flag and queued a fresh export
The new export includes the expected custom fields
The admin lost the MFA device and needs a reset
We verified the requester and started the secure MFA reset flow
Ticket resolved after reset confirmation
Payment API calls are failing in production and this is a Sev1 outage
We declared an incident bridge and escalated to the API on call team
Gateway deployment is rolling back because payment route health checks failed
The ERP connector retries duplicate order creation
We disabled retry on duplicate order responses and are checking idempotency keys
Connector now preserves idempotency keys during retry
Can we schedule weekly exports for audit review
Weekly exports can be scheduled from the data export settings page
Where should we submit the tax exemption certificate
Upload the certificate in billing settings and reply with the document ID
Rotated API keys work locally but fail in our deploy pipeline
The deploy environment still references the retired key alias
Login succeeds in Chrome but Edge shows stale session
Clear the Edge session cookie and retry after the session policy refresh
Slack alerts go to the default channel instead of the mapped channel
We updated the channel mapping cache and asked for a test alert
Does the recent latency breach qualify for SLA credits
We are reviewing the SLA policy and incident timeline before confirming credit eligibility
The export API returns only one page even when more data exists
We reproduced the pagination issue and escalated to data platform engineering
New admins cannot invite teammates from workspace settings
We are checking whether the admin role has the invite permission flag
The payment integration disconnects several times each day
We escalated to integration engineering and opened an incident bridge
How do we change the billing contact before renewal
The current billing owner can update the contact from billing settings
